lost_reports.description: Lost my university student ID card. Blue card with my photo and student number 20210001. Has a small scratch on the top right corner.
Lost my black MacBook Pro charger with USB-C cable. The cable has a small white tape near the adapter end.
Missing my dark blue HydroFlask water bottle with university sticker on it. 32oz size.
Lost a spiral notebook with red cover. Contains my calculus and linear algebra notes. Name written inside the front cover.
Lost Sony WH-1000XM4 black wireless noise-cancelling headphones. Has a small sticker on the left ear cup.
Lost my keys — a set of 3 keys on a red keychain with a small flashlight attached.
Dell laptop charger missing. Black rectangular adapter with blue light indicator. 65W model.
Student ID card lost. White card with green stripe and my name Hana Samir printed on it.
Lost a silver stainless steel thermos. Has a dent on the bottom. Keeps drinks hot for 12 hours.
A5 black hardcover notebook lost. Contains product design notes and sketches for my senior project.
White Apple AirPods Pro (2nd gen) missing. In a white charging case with a small dent.
Car key and two house keys on a black leather keychain. Toyota logo on the key fob.
iPhone 15 USB-C charger cable lost. White cable, 1 meter length. Left in the classroom.
University ID card missing. Has photo ID and barcode. Blue background with white text.
Green Yeti tumbler lost with my university logo on it. 20oz. Has a dent near the base.
Physics lab notebook with blue cover. Has lab reports from weeks 1 through 6 inside.
JBL Tune 520BT wireless headphones lost. Blue color. Left at charging station near library.
Home keys on an orange keychain. Has 4 keys total, one of them is a padlock key.
Samsung 45W fast charger adapter lost. Black adapter with white Samsung logo.
Student access card with magnetic strip missing. Used to enter the dorms. Has my photo on it.

found_reports.description: Found a blue university student ID card near the cafeteria. Has a photo and student number on it. Slight scratch visible.
Found a black MacBook charger USB-C in the engineering lab. Has white tape wrapping near the adapter.
Found a red spiral notebook in lecture hall B. Has calculus formulas written inside. Name in the cover.
found_reports.location_found: Math Department Lecture Hall B Front Row

found_reports.description: Found a large dark blue water bottle near library study area. Has a university sticker on the side.
Found a pair of black Sony noise-cancelling headphones. Has a small colored sticker on the side. Works fine.
Found 3 keys on a red keychain with a mini torch attached. Near the parking area.
Dell laptop charger found in computer lab. Black adapter with blue LED ring. 65W model label visible.
found_reports.location_found: Computer Lab Building C Room 205 Desk 8

found_reports.description: Found a white student ID card with green stripe. Name is Hana Samir. Found near admin office.
Silver thermos found in the sports area. Has a small dent on the bottom. Looks like it keeps drinks hot.
Found a black A5 hardcover notebook. Has design sketches and project notes inside. Found in building D.

found_reports.description: Found white AirPods in a white charging case near engineering building. Has a small dent on case.
Black leather keychain with Toyota logo found. Has 3 keys attached. Car key with fob.
Found white USB-C charging cable in lecture hall. Approximately 1 meter long. iPhone compatible.

found_reports.description: Blue university ID card found near library turnstiles. Has barcode and photo. Says student ID.
Green Yeti-style insulated cup found. Has a university logo printed on it. Small dent near bottom.
Blue covered notebook found with physics lab reports inside. Dated weeks 1 to 6.

Orange keychain with 4 keys found in the cafeteria. One key looks like a padlock key.
